quotes.text: A senior developer is just a junior developer who has Googled more things.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Junior dev: 'I don't know what I'm doing.' Senior dev: 'I also don't know what I'm doing, but faster and with more confidence.'
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Rewriting from scratch is always tempting. It's also always a terrible idea. But you won't believe me until you've done it yourself.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The difference between a senior and a junior dev isn't knowledge. It's knowing which shortcuts will haunt you later.
quotes.author: based
